goals.lastStatus: Goal auto-continue paused after 2 continuation turn(s) with no tool calls (possible self-chat loop). Run /goal resume to continue.
goals.lastAssistantText:
Database is ready. Now start the server:

```bash
podman run -it --rm --pod sure-app \
  -e RAILS_ENV=production \
  -e SECRET_KEY_BASE="$(openssl rand -hex 64)" \
  -e DB_HOST=localhost \
  -e DB_PORT=5432 \
  -e POSTGRES_USER=postgres \
  -e POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres \
  -e REDIS_URL=redis://localhost:6379/1 \
  -e SELF_HOSTED=true \
  -e ONBOARDING_STATE=open \
  -v "$(pwd):/rails" \
  sure-dev
```

Then open `http://localhost:3000`. You'll be on the onboarding page — create an account and you're in.
